def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    rsi_window = params['rsi_window']
    atr_window = params['atr_window']
    momentum_window = params['momentum_window']
    threshold = params['threshold']
    
    rsi = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_window)
    atr = ta.volatility.average_true_range(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_window)
    momentum = df['close'].pct_change(momentum_window)
    
    signals = np.zeros(len(df))
    signals[(rsi > 70) & (momentum < -threshold)] = -1
    signals[(rsi < 30) & (momentum > threshold)] = 1
    
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: USD/JPY exhibits momentum reversals when RSI indicates overbought/oversold conditions and significant momentum shifts occur.
